hero.label: INFORMATICS STUDENT • AI SPECIALIZATION
hero.description: I am a 6th-semester Informatics student with a strong foundation in both software engineering and artificial intelligence. My academic focus has equipped me with the skills to develop robust web applications while also exploring the cutting edge of AI-driven solutions.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.heading: Professional Background
about.paragraph1: I approach code as a craft, balancing the right ingredients of technical performance with the fluid needs of human-centric design. While my foundation is built on rigorous academic coursework, my practical skills have been honed through extensive campus projects. I have experience taking complex requirements, from system design to application deployment, and turning them into functional, well-architected solutions.
about.paragraph2suffix: . Whether building a system design, crafting a database query, or fine-tuning pixel-perfect interfaces, the goal remains the same: to create software that feels as good to use as it is robust to maintain.

skills.label: SKILLS
skills.heading: Technical Arsenal
skills.description: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.
skills.planningToLearnDesc: Technologies on my radar that I'm excited to explore next.

contact.label: AVAILABILITY

contact.description: Currently open to select freelance projects or an internship program. If you have a vision that requires precision, I'd love to hear it.
